description: Tests if the sum of numeric outcome values satisfies a comparison condition. Used as a predicate inside event() expressions. Supports comparison operators: =, >, <, >=, <=.
utility: Filter outcomes by their numeric sum

arguments.name: operator
arguments.description: Comparison operator (=, >, <, >=, <=). Defaults to = if omitted.

arguments.name: targetValue
arguments.description: Numeric value to compare the sum against

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, sum(7), fc(coral))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, sum(>, 8), fc(steelblue))

examples.scenario: Sum less than or equal to 4
examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, sum(<=, 4), fc(gold))
